/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
n = symbols('n')
S1 = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
print('S1=', S1)
print('S1.is_subset(Reals)=', S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('Intersection=', S1.intersect(S.Reals), repr(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('2 in S1=', S1.contains(2), 2 in S1)
print('2 in inter=', S1.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2), 2 in S1.intersect(S.Reals))
from sympy.sets.handlers.intersection import intersection_sets
print('direct handler=', intersection_sets(S1, S.Reals), repr(intersection_sets(S1, S.Reals)))
f=S1.lamda.expr
nr=Dummy('n', real=True)
fr=f.subs(n,nr)
print('fr/reim=', fr, fr.as_real_imag())
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
im=expand_complex(fr.as_real_imag()[1]).subs(nr,n)
print('im=',im, 'args=', Mul.make_args(im))
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
print('solutions factors=', [solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols])
print('subtract tuple FS=', S.Integers - FiniteSet((-1,1)))
print('subtract unpack FS=', S.Integers - FiniteSet(-1,1))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "git remote -v
rg -n \"base_set [\\-&|+]= (FiniteSet|ConditionSet)|exclude values that make denominators\" . --glob '*.py' --glob '"'!sympy/sets/handlers/intersection.py'"'
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.sets.handlers.intersection import intersection_sets
S1 = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
r = S1.intersect(S.Reals)
print('S1.is_subset(Reals):', S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersection:', repr(r), r)
print('base set:', getattr(r, 'base_set', None))
print('FiniteSet tuple:', FiniteSet((-1, 1)))
print('FiniteSet unpacked:', FiniteSet(*(-1, 1)))
for expr in [
 n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I,
 n + (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)*I,
 n + (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)*(n + 1)*I,
 n/2 + ((n - 1)*(n + S.Half)).expand()*I,
 n/(1/n - 1) + (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)*(n + 1)*I,
 n/(n - 6) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2),
 n/(n**2 - 9) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2),
]:
    img = imageset(Lambda(n, expr), S.Integers)
    print(expr, '->', img.intersect(S.Reals))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
im=(n-1)*(n+1)
print(__version__)
print(Mul.make_args(im))
print([solve_linear(i, 0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols])
x, xis=zip(*[solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols])
print(x,xis,FiniteSet(xis),FiniteSet(*xis))
S1=imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers)
print('subset Reals',S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersect',repr(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('contains',S1.contains(2),S1.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2),2 in S1.intersect(S.Reals))
PY
rg -n \"19513|19514|imageset_intersect_real|univarite imaginary\" . -g '*.md' -g '*.rst' -g '*.py'"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '690,750p' sympy/sets/tests/test_sets.py; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import sympy
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
im=(n-1)*(n+1)
print('version', sympy.__version__)
print('args', Mul.make_args(im))
sol=[solve_linear(i, 0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]
print('solve', sol)
x, xis=zip(*sol)
print('x/xis', x,xis,'FS tuple',FiniteSet(xis),'FS unpacked',FiniteSet(*xis))
S1=imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers)
print('subset Reals',S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('intersect',repr(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('contains S1/ix',S1.contains(2),S1.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2),2 in S1.intersect(S.Reals))
PY"

nl -ba sympy/sets/tests/test_fancysets.py | sed -n '1075,1110p'"

/bin/zsh -lc './.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q sympy/sets/tests/test_fancysets.py -x'

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python -c 'from sympy import *; from sympy.abc import n; from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear, denoms; f=n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I; s=imageset(Lambda(n,f),S.Integers); print(\"subset\", s.is_subset(S.Reals)); print(\"intersection\",s.intersect(S.Reals)); print(\"contains2\",s.contains(2),s.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2)); nr=Dummy(\"n\",real=True); im=expand_complex(f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag()[1]).subs(nr,n); print(\"im\",im,\"args\",Mul.make_args(im)); print(\"sol\",[solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]); g=n/(1/n-1)+(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1)*I; print(\"denoms\",denoms(g)); [print(d, Mul.make_args(d), [solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(d) if n in i.free_symbols]) for d in denoms(g) if d.has(n)]'"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python -c 'from sympy import *; from sympy.abc import n; from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear, denoms; f=n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I; s=imageset(Lambda(n,f),S.Integers); print(\"subset\", s.is_subset(S.Reals)); print(\"intersection\",s.intersect(S.Reals)); print(\"contains2\",s.contains(2),s.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2)); nr=Dummy(\"n\",real=True); im=expand_complex(f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag()[1]).subs(nr,n); print(\"im\",im,\"args\",Mul.make_args(im)); print(\"sol\",[solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]); g=n/(1/n-1)+(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1)*I; print(\"denoms\",denoms(g)); [print(d, Mul.make_args(d), [solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(d) if n in i.free_symbols]) for d in denoms(g) if d.has(n)]'"
